texto: The greatest thing anyone can do for God and man is pray. It is not the only thing
autor: but it is the chief thing. The great people of the earth today are the people who pray. I do not mean those who talk about prayer
explicacao: Citação de but it is the chief thing. The great people of the earth today are the people who pray. I do not mean those who talk about prayer sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The greatest thing anyone can do for God and man is pray. It is not the only thing” articula reflexao, not-those-who-can-explain-about-prayer, thing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
